summary: SlowAPI `@limiter.limit()` requires the `Request` parameter to be named exactly `request` (not `http_request` or any alias) — SlowAPI inspects the function signature by name and raises `Exception: No "request" or "websocket" argument on function` at decorator application time if the name doesn't match. All rate-limited handlers in `backend/app/routers/` use `request: Request` for this reason.
